mnemonics: S.C.R.U.M. for SQLite: Structure (Schema), Create (SQLiteOpenHelper), Read (Query), Update (Update), Manage (Transactions)
keyPoints: SQLiteOpenHelper class manages database creation and version management
CRUD operations are performed using SQLiteDatabase object methods like insert(), query(), update(), delete()
Always close Cursor objects after querying to avoid memory leaks
commonMistakes: Forgetting to call db.close() causing resource leaks
Not upgrading database version properly when schema changes, leading to crashes
Performing database operations on the main thread, causing Application Not Responding (ANR) errors
